summary: Implemented a deterministic 30-day hello simulation shared by the Node runner and Worker-compatible adapter; both paths produce state hash 61e0ba1c.

tests_run.result: Updated workspace lockfile for 7 workspace projects.
Architecture boundaries passed; deterministic hello simulation matched for 30 days with Node hash 61e0ba1c and Worker-compatible hash 61e0ba1c.
Node hash 61e0ba1c matched Worker-compatible hash 61e0ba1c for the fixed 30-day request.
ESLint completed successfully over apps, packages, tools, and root config files.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 1 expected violation.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check completed successfully.
Listed active tasks; FOUNDATION-003 remains IN_PROGRESS pending review.

decisions: Kept sim-core pure and platform-free; it imports only protocol DTO types/constants and uses deterministic integer/string hashing without Math.random, Date.now, performance.now, DOM, Node IO, React, Pixi, Electron, or filesystem APIs.
Modeled the cross-boundary hello input/result as explicit serializable DTOs in packages/protocol.
Implemented apps/web/src/worker as a Worker-compatible adapter module only; no browser UI or real gameplay systems were introduced.
risks: The Worker path is a testable Worker-compatible adapter rather than a browser Worker bootstrap; a later client task may wrap it in an actual Worker entry when the web package boundary exists.
requested_action: Verify FOUNDATION-003 acceptance criteria, diff scope, architecture boundaries, and recorded test evidence.
